creator: binkley.jim@gmail.com
text:
You have a port for "ourmon", my open-source project.  net-mgmt/ourmon  See
http://ourmon.sourceforge.net for example.  The port is out of
date and the port maintainer has not done anything about it.
Please please please get rid of the port.  It's about 4 revs out
of date at this point.  This will make everyone's life simpler.
I am the principal maintainer of ourmon.

Jim Binkley,  binkley.jim@gmail.com  or send email to my sourceforge
alias or jrb@cs.pdx.edu.  Thank you.

Fix: 

Delete the port.
